expectations.text: Auth callback route exists and uses exchangeCodeForSession
Server-side logout via signOut() inside a Server Action exists
Password reset uses resetPasswordForEmail plus a distinct update-password step gated by a valid recovery session
expectations.evidence: resetPasswordForEmail in: ['SUMMARY.md', 'app/reset-password/actions.ts', 'app/auth/callback/route.ts']; update-password path exists: True

expectations.text: Middleware syncs refreshed cookies onto both request and response
Existing email/password login is preserved alongside the new magic-link option
